name: hb-qa-agents
description: Custom chat participants for HealthBridge QA workflows

chatParticipants.name: hb-acceptance-tests
chatParticipants.description: Generate comprehensive acceptance test scenarios from Jira tickets or branch changes

chatParticipants.name: hb-code-review
chatParticipants.description: Analyze branches for code quality, test coverage, and identify testing needs

chatParticipants.name: hb-bug-report
chatParticipants.description: Analyze errors/exceptions and generate JIRA-ready bug reports

chatParticipants.name: hb-feedback
chatParticipants.description: Collect and analyze QA feedback from test cycles

chatParticipants.name: hb-setup
chatParticipants.description: Interactive wizard to adapt QA Agents framework to your project
